column1: # Shows how much work our patches skipped vs total calls
=== CALL CHAIN: WHO CALLS GetAttackTarget / GetRevengeTarget ===
# 'Direct/Unknown' = called from a site we don't instrument
# How much CPU time (ms) the GAME spends per zombie for each system.
# This is NOT profiling overhead — it is the actual game workload divided by zombie count.
# Lower values = better optimization. Compare across captures to track improvement.
